cause_description: More or fewer transactions at similar rates
Syndicate allocations, new issues, referrals that don't repeat
Revenue moved between credited and non-credited reason codes month over month
Revenue excluded by the 90-day rule (processed more than 90 days after the trade) changed month over month
Revenue moved between credited and excluded reason codes (e.g. deleted bookings) month over month
Quarterly billing cycle falls in one month not the other
Different number of billing days between months
Shift between products at different rates
Accounts contributing this month but not last
Accounts contributing last month but not this
First period in the loaded data — account-level attribution requires a prior period
